'''rashatha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:ibrutinib|ibrutinib]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-sh-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ibrutinib|ibrutinib]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| rashatha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:ræshæthæth|ræshæthæth]] || [[word:ræshæthæj|ræshæthæj]] || [[word:ræshæthæsh|ræshæthæsh]] || [[word:ræshæthæ|ræshæthæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:rashashathath|rashashathath]] || [[word:rashashathaj|rashashathaj]] || [[word:rashashathash|rashashathash]] || [[word:rashashatha|rashashatha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:rashathath|rashathath]] || [[word:rashathaj|rashathaj]] || [[word:rashathash|rashathash]] || [[word:rashatha|rashatha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:rashafthafth|rashafthafth]] || [[word:rashafthafj|rashafthafj]] || [[word:rashafthafsh|rashafthafsh]] || [[word:rashafthaf|rashafthaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:rashathatha|rashathatha]] || [[word:rashathaja|rashathaja]] || [[word:rashathasha|rashathasha]] || [[word:rashathaka|rashathaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:rashathath|rashathath]] || [[word:rashathaj|rashathaj]] || [[word:rashathash|rashathash]] || [[word:rashatha|rashatha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:rashathathal|rashathathal]] || [[word:rashathajal|rashathajal]] || [[word:rashathashal|rashathashal]] || [[word:rashathakal|rashathakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:rashathaathatha|rashathaathatha]] || [[word:rashathaajaja|rashathaajaja]] || [[word:rashathaashasha|rashathaashasha]] || [[word:rashathaaka|rashathaaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:rashathathan|rashathathan]] || [[word:rashathajan|rashathajan]] || [[word:rashathashan|rashathashan]] || [[word:rashathakan|rashathakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:rashathathaoro|rashathathaoro]] || [[word:rashathajaoro|rashathajaoro]] || [[word:rashathashaoro|rashathashaoro]] || [[word:rashathakaoro|rashathakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d5728ff}}
